mapper.select: SELECT TRD_SN FROM TRADE WHERE PRD_SN = #{productId} AND TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' ORDER BY TRD_SN DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeSn, t.BID_SN AS bidSn, t.BYPR_USR_SN AS buyerUsrSn, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatusCd, t.TRD_AMT AS tradeAmount FROM TRADE t WHERE t.PRD_SN = #{productId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001'
ORDER BY t.TRD_REG_DT DESC, t.TRD_SN DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRADE ( SLLR_USR_SN, BYPR_USR_SN, PRD_SN, BID_SN, TRD_TYPE_CD, TRD_STATUS_CD, TRD_AMT ) VALUES ( #{sellerUserId}, #{buyerUserId}, #{productId}, #{bidId}, #{tradeTypeCode}, #{tradeStatusCode}, #{tradeAmount} )
INSERT INTO TRADE_DELIVERY ( TRD_SN, TRD_DLVR_ADDR, TRD_DLVR_DADDR, TRD_DLVR_ZIP ) VALUES ( #{tradeId}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{zip} )
mapper.select: SELECT t.PRD_SN AS prdSn, t.TRD_SN AS tradeSn, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatusCd FROM TRADE t WHERE t.SLLR_USR_SN = #{sellerUserId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' ORDER BY t.TRD_REG_DT DESC, t.TRD_SN DESC

SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, CASE WHEN t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{userId} THEN 'BUYER' ELSE 'SELLER' END AS userRole, p.PRD_NM AS productName, CASE WHEN t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{userId} THEN t.SLLR_USR_SN ELSE t.BYPR_USR_SN END AS counterpartUserId, CASE WHEN t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{userId} THEN seller.USR_NM ELSE buyer.USR_NM END AS counterpartNickname, t.TRD_AMT AS tradeAmount, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatus, CASE p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD WHEN 'TRDC0009' THEN 'DELIVERY' WHEN 'TRDC0010' THEN 'OFFLINE' END AS tradeMethod, t.TRD_REG_DT AS createdAt, t.TRD_AUTO_CMPL_DT AS autoCompleteAt, CONCAT_WS(' ', d.TRD_DLVR_ADDR, d.TRD_DLVR_DADDR) AS deliveryAddress, d.TRD_DLVR_MEMO_CN AS deliveryMessage, d.TRD_DLVR_SN AS deliveryId, o.TRD_OFL_DT AS meetingDateTime, o.TRD_OFL_PLC_NM AS meetingPlace, o.TRD_OFL_ADDR AS meetingAddress FROM TRADE t JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = t.PRD_SN JOIN USERS seller ON seller.USR_SN = t.SLLR_USR_SN JOIN USERS buyer ON buyer.USR_SN = t.BYPR_USR_SN LEFT JOIN TRADE_DELIVERY d ON d.TRD_SN = t.TRD_SN LEFT JOIN TRADE_OFFLINE o ON o.TRD_SN = t.TRD_SN WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND (t.SLLR_USR_SN = #{userId} OR t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{userId})
SELECT f.FL_SN AS fileId, f.TRD_DLVR_FL_SORT_NO AS sortOrder FROM TRADE_DELIVERY_FILE f WHERE f.TRD_DLVR_SN = #{deliveryId} ORDER BY f.TRD_DLVR_FL_SORT_NO ASC, f.FL_SN ASC

SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, d.TRD_DLVR_SN AS deliveryId, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatus FROM TRADE t JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = t.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN TRADE_DELIVERY d ON d.TRD_SN = t.TRD_SN WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND t.SLLR_USR_SN = #{sellerUserId} AND p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD = 'TRDC0009' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRADE_DELIVERY (TRD_SN) VALUES (#{tradeId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TRD_SN = VALUES(TRD_SN)
mapper.select: SELECT TRD_DLVR_SN FROM TRADE_DELIVERY WHERE TRD_SN = #{tradeId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT t.TRD_SN FROM TRADE t JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = t.PRD_SN WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND t.SLLR_USR_SN = #{sellerUserId} AND p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD = 'TRDC0010' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRADE_OFFLINE ( TRD_SN, TRD_OFL_PLC_NM, TRD_OFL_ADDR, TRD_OFL_DT ) VALUES ( #{tradeId}, #{meetingPlace}, #{meetingAddress}, #{meetingDateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TRD_OFL_PLC_NM = VALUES(TRD_OFL_PLC_NM), TRD_OFL_ADDR = VALUES(TRD_OFL_ADDR), TRD_OFL_DT = VALUES(TRD_OFL_DT)
mapper.select: SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, t.SLLR_USR_SN AS sellerUserId, t.BYPR_USR_SN AS buyerUserId, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatus FROM TRADE t WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{buyerUserId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT t.TRD_SN FROM TRADE t WHERE t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND t.TRD_STATUS_CD = 'TRDC0005' AND t.TRD_AUTO_CMPL_DT IS NOT NULL AND t.TRD_AUTO_CMPL_DT <= #{now} ORDER BY t.TRD_AUTO_CMPL_DT ASC, t.TRD_SN ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, t.SLLR_USR_SN AS sellerUserId, t.BYPR_USR_SN AS buyerUserId, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatus, t.TRD_AUTO_CMPL_DT AS autoCompleteAt FROM TRADE t WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND t.TRD_STATUS_CD = 'TRDC0005' FOR UPDATE
SELECT t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, t.BYPR_USR_SN AS buyerUserId, t.BID_SN AS bidSn, t.TRD_STATUS_CD AS tradeStatus FROM TRADE t WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' FOR UPDATE
